data.content: Console tabs now keep beat ID prefixes for multi-project disambiguation by splitting IDs into prefix/local parts (rendered as prefix-<id>). Added unit tests for splitTerminalTabBeatId. Validation: lint passed (existing warnings), tsc passed, unit tests passed; build fails on clean origin/main with pre-existing Next prerender error on /_global-error and React key warnings. Landed and pushed commit a2ce0b35cf33ed8921ce98c87225ea05776c518a to origin/main.
